checks.description: Guardrail: avoid assuming a fixed-cycle latency for edge cases where timing is ambiguous.
notes: The contract does not specify exact latency; therefore the oracle only requires observable progress without cycle-precise claims.
checks.pass_condition: The test must not rely on a specific number of cycles between input stimulus and output assertion; any externally visible change that respects the grouping semantics is acceptable.
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge case stimulus (case edge_001) is applied.

checks.pass_condition: After exactly four consecutive valid_in=1 samples are presented, valid_out must assert for one cycle and data_out must equal the sum of the four data_in values driven in the plan (e.g., 1+2+3+4 = 10). No output may be asserted before the fourth sample.
checks.trigger_condition: When the deterministic stimulus drives four consecutive valid_in=1 samples as defined in case basic_001.
